meaning: n.[解] 踝,踝骨,眼睑软骨,跗骨
examples: He said his name was Saul of Tarsus.
The tarsus bone in her ankle is shaped like our ancestors.
Did Paul of Tarsus belong to any philosophical school or mystical group?
When Saul of Tarsus set out on his journey to Damascus the whole of the known world lay in bondage.
